ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ecms" (
  "ecm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ECM */,
  "tag_number" TEXT /* Tag number assigned to the ECM */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ECM */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the ECM */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ECM, including condition and features */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ECM */,
  "core_price" REAL /* Core price of the ECM (if applicable) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the ECM (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the ECM */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with specific vehicle models or years */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the ECM was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecms_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecms_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine the model is designed for */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type (e.g., diesel, gasoline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the warehouse */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "ecm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ECM */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ECM in the warehouse */,
  "date_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ecm_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecm_id") REFERENCES ecms ("ecm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "ecm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ECM ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ECM ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who processed the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ecm_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecm_id") REFERENCES ecms ("ecm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate of the sales representative */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was hired */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory the sales representative covers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "delivered_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_returns" (
  "core_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "core_price" REAL /* Price of the core */,
  "core_return_date" TEXT /* Date the core was returned */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the core */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the core refund was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_core_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales representative, customer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_notes" (
  "order_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order note entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note added to the order */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_by" TEXT /* User who added the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_notes_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecm_images" (
  "ecm_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ECM image entry */,
  "ecm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ECM */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecm_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecm_images_ecm_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecm_id") REFERENCES ecms ("ecm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecm_specs" (
  "ecm_spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ECM spec entry */,
  "ecm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ECM */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecm_spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecm_specs_ecm_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecm_id") REFERENCES ecms ("ecm_id")
)
